summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No close, merge, fix, or PR-creation actions are planned because the job disables those lanes; open useful PRs stay open for maintainer/product review, security-sensitive refs are quarantined, and closed historical refs are not mutation targets.
